reason: Frontend feature change; provides the required guideline index and pre-development checklist.
Keep upload feature code in the established route/feature/shared layout.
New upload UI controls must follow existing client component boundaries and shared component patterns.
Clipboard and URL source handling may use React callbacks/effects and should follow hook conventions.
Upload state must continue using the existing Zustand store pattern without page-local duplication.
URL-to-File and clipboard handling require explicit browser API and runtime validation.
Upload UI must remain accessible, localized, and verifiable with lint/typecheck/build.
